zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Sulyard於1462年出生在英國艾可希 拉沃時，他的父親Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England34歲，母親Agnes Hungate32歲。他於大約1474年與Mirabel Copdowe在英國艾可希 拉沃結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1516年在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可維瑟爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Sulyard于1462年出生在英国艾可希 拉沃时，他的父亲Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England34岁，母亲Agnes Hungate32岁。他于大约1474年与Mirabel Copdowe在英国艾可希 拉沃结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1516年在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可維瑟爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Sulyard was born in 1462, in High Laver, Essex, England, his father, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, was 34 and his mother, Agnes Hungate, was 32. He married Mirabel Copdowe about 1474, in High Laver, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1516, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Wetherden, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Sulyard est né en 1462, à High Laver, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hungate, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mirabel Copdowe environ 1474, à High Laver, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1516, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Wetherden, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.High Laver, Essex, England, UK: High Laver, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Sulyard 1462 in High Laver, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England 34 und seine Mutter Agnes Hungate 32. Er hat um 1474 in High Laver, Essex, England Mirabel Copdowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1516 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wetherden, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Mirabel Copdowe circa 1474, nel High Laver, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1516, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Wetherden, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Sulyardが1462年にイギリスエセックスヒグ ラバーで生まれた時，父Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of Englandは34歳，母Agnes Hungateは32歳であった。約1474年にイギリスエセックスヒグ ラバーでMirabel Copdoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1516年に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウエスエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Sulyard(이)가 1462년 영국 에세스 히그h 레이버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Hungate(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1474년 영국 에세스 히그h 레이버에서 Mirabel Copdowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1516년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 w더든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Sulyard nasceu em 1462, em High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hungate, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mirabel Copdowe aproximadamente 1474, em High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1516, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.High Laver, Essex, England, UK: High Laver, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Sulyard родился в 1462 г. в местности хаи лавир, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Mervyn Sulyard Chief Justice of England было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hungate, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mirabel Copdowe около 1474 г. в местности хаи лавир, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1516 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности ветирден, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Mirabel Copdowe aproximadamente 1474, en High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1516, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Wetherden, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
